entries.title: CrossPointe Staff Directory and Titles
requiredFacts: CrossPointe's paid staff are Chris Todd, Lead Pastor; Mike Lewis, Worship Pastor; Jared Perry, Student Pastor or Youth Pastor; Angie Laubach, Children's Ministry Director; Tyler Dickey, Creative Director; Bob Usry, Care Pastor; Katelyn Balliett, Elementary Director/Multimedia Specialist; Cathy Brown, Operations Administrator; Ron Porter, Maintenance Director; Lecia Adams, Early Learning Center Director; Riley Baker, Worship Technology Director; and John Gifford, Staff Support Pastor.
Chris Todd, Mike Lewis, Jared Perry, Bob Usry, and John Gifford may be called pastors.
Tyler Dickey is ordained, but Pastor is not part of his current title; refer to him as Creative Director.
requiredActions: Answer only with the people relevant to the question unless the full list is requested.

entries.title: Contacting Staff and General Pastoral Requests
sampleQuestions: How do I contact a staff member?
Can I speak to the pastor?
How do I reach Chris Todd?
I need to talk with a pastor
requiredFacts: Appropriate contact requests should use the contact form on the staff member's public profile.
If an individual profile is unavailable, use crosspointe.tv/staff or the church office.
General requests to speak with 'the pastor' should go through the church office so the appropriate pastor can be assigned.
Pastoral requests may be distributed according to availability and need.
prohibitedClaims: Do not guarantee a particular pastor, response time, appointment, visit, or outcome.

approvedActions.label: Call or text the church office

entries.title: Lead Pastor, Worship Pastor, and Student Pastor Responsibilities
requiredFacts: Chris Todd is Lead Pastor and handles lead-pastor responsibilities, baptism questions, spiritual guidance, short-term pastoral counseling, visitation, and pastoral care, though requests may be assigned to another pastor.
Mike Lewis is Worship Pastor and oversees Worship Ministry and Pointe Groups.
Jared Perry is Student Pastor and oversees CrossPointe Student Ministries for grades 6 through 12; Youth Pastor is also an accepted title.
prohibitedClaims: Do not promise that a particular pastor will personally handle a request.

entries.title: Children's and Elementary Ministry Leadership
sampleQuestions: How do I contact Angie Laubach?
requiredFacts: Angie Laubach is Children's Ministry Director and oversees all children's ministries, including Kingdom Kids and nursery, preschool, and elementary areas.
Katelyn Balliett is Elementary Director/Multimedia Specialist and oversees Kingdom Kids elementary Sunday School and Sunday morning curriculum.
Katelyn also assists the Creative Team with graphic design, social media, and approved multimedia projects.
requiredActions: When asked who oversees Kingdom Kids, state that Angie Laubach oversees the whole ministry and that Katelyn Balliett oversees the elementary area when that distinction is relevant.

entries.title: Creative Ministries and Tyler Dickey
sampleQuestions: Who should I contact about Central?
requiredFacts: Tyler Dickey is Creative Director and oversees the website, social media, CrossPointe Central, Wayfinder, graphic design, print materials, promotion, and communications.
requiredActions: Direct appropriate website, Central, Wayfinder, social-media, or promotional feedback to Tyler's public staff profile.
prohibitedClaims: Do not reveal internal systems, credentials, security details, unpublished plans, or implementation details.

entries.title: Care Pastor, Funerals, Hospital Visits, and Pastoral Care
sampleQuestions: Who do I call about a funeral?
Who should I contact about a funeral?
Can a pastor visit the hospital?
How do I request pastoral care?
requiredFacts: Bob Usry is Care Pastor and his public responsibilities include hospital visits, funerals, prayer, and pastoral care.
All funeral, hospital-visitation, and pastoral-care requests should begin with the church office so they can be assigned and followed up appropriately.
prohibitedClaims: Do not promise that Bob or another particular pastor will personally handle the request.

entries.title: Office, Maintenance, and Early Learning Center Leadership
sampleQuestions: Who do I tell about a maintenance problem?
What is the Early Learning Center?
requiredFacts: Cathy Brown is Operations Administrator and receives and routes public office questions and requests.
Ron Porter is Maintenance Director, but public maintenance and facilities reports should go through the church office.
Lecia Adams is Early Learning Center Director and oversees the program and its employees.
The Early Learning Center is a Mother's Day Out program for children ages two and older.
requiredActions: Keep detailed ELC answers brief until its dedicated knowledge document is approved, and direct enrollment, schedule, cost, availability, policy, or employment questions to the ELC or church office.
prohibitedClaims: Do not provide maintenance access, infrastructure, schedule, or security details.

entries.title: Worship Technology, A/V, and Livestream
sampleQuestions: Who should I tell about an audio problem?
requiredFacts: Riley Baker is Worship Technology Director, works under Tyler Dickey within Creative Ministries, oversees campus A/V resources, leads the Tech Team, and supports Sunday services and the livestream.
requiredActions: Direct public A/V or livestream problem reports to Riley's public staff profile.
prohibitedClaims: Do not provide credentials, network details, equipment-access instructions, internal production procedures, or security-sensitive information.

entries.title: Staff Support Pastor
sampleQuestions: What does the Staff Support Pastor do?
Who cares for the church staff?
requiredFacts: John Gifford is Staff Support Pastor and supports the health, care, and satisfaction of CrossPointe staff and volunteers so those who care for others are also cared for.
prohibitedClaims: Do not describe confidential personnel, complaint, employment, disciplinary, or staff-support matters.

entries.title: Volunteer-Led Ministry Leaders
requiredFacts: Care Center and CARS Ministry are volunteer-led ministries.
Joshua Knoettgen is the current CARS Ministry leader.
Johnnie Poiroit is the current Care Center ministry leader.
requiredActions: Mention a leader's name only when specifically asked who leads that ministry; ordinary assistance requests should use Document 09 processes.
prohibitedClaims: Do not use outdated public information naming Sam Crump as the current CARS leader.

entries.title: Ladies Connect Leadership
sampleQuestions: Who should I contact about Ladies Night?
requiredFacts: CrossPointe's women's ministry is officially called Ladies Connect, and Angie Laubach leads it. People may still use women's ministry, ladies ministry, or Ladies Night when asking about Ladies Connect.
requiredActions: Call the ministry Ladies Connect in the answer and provide Angie's approved staff-profile link for leadership or contact questions.
prohibitedClaims: Do not direct Women's Ministry questions to Mike Lewis.

entries.title: Men's Ministry Leadership
requiredFacts: Lead Pastor Chris Todd leads CrossPointe's Men's Ministry.
requiredActions: Provide Chris Todd's approved staff-profile link for Men's Ministry leadership or contact questions.

entries.title: Public Staff Biographies and Approved Ministry Structure
sampleQuestions: How long has Chris been a pastor?
Where did Mike go to school?
Can Wayfinder tell me about a staff member?
requiredFacts: Wayfinder may use harmless information intentionally published in a staff member's official website biography.
Approved ministry relationships may be described, but undocumented reporting relationships must not be inferred from titles.
Further organizational questions should go to the church office.
prohibitedClaims: Do not infer, search for, or reveal personal information beyond approved public profiles.

entries.title: Private Staff Schedules, Whereabouts, and Employment Matters
sampleQuestions: Is Chris at church right now?
What is a staff member's schedule?
How much does the pastor make?
Is a staff member being disciplined?
requiredFacts: Staff schedules, whereabouts, employment matters, compensation, performance, discipline, personnel records, and private internal responsibilities are not public Wayfinder information.
requiredActions: For an appropriate availability question, direct the person to the church office without confirming a schedule or location.
prohibitedClaims: Do not confirm whether any private personnel or disciplinary matter exists.
